## Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit `.env`, real secrets, cookies, sessions, local databases, or browser profiles.
- [ ] I did not commit `node_modules`, `.next`, coverage, or build/cache output.
- [ ] I ran the relevant tests or documented why they could not run.
- [ ] I updated `docs/AI_HANDOFF.md` if this changes project state or next steps.
- [ ] I avoided platform write actions unless explicitly requested.
